mapper.sql: select id, user_id, vaccine_id, appointment_date, time_slot, status, phone, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from vaccine_appointment
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.user_id, u.user_name as userName, u.phonenumber as userPhone, a.vaccine_id, v.name as vaccineName, v.suitable_age as suitableAge, v.manufacturer as manufacturer, a.appointment_date, a.time_slot, a.status, a.phone, a.remark, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.dose_number as dose_number, a.next_dose_date as next_dose_date, a.is_completed as is_completed FROM vaccine_appointment a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN vaccine_information v ON a.vaccine_id = v.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
select count(*) from vaccine_appointment where status = '0'
mapper.insert:
insert into vaccine_appointment
user_id, vaccine_id, appointment_date, time_slot, status, phone, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
dose_number, next_dose_date, is_completed,
#{userId}, #{vaccineId}, #{appointmentDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{status}, #{phone}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
#{doseNumber}, #{nextDoseDate}, #{isCompleted},
mapper.update:
update vaccine_appointment
user_id = #{userId}, vaccine_id = #{vaccineId}, appointment_date = #{appointmentDate}, time_slot = #{timeSlot}, status = #{status}, phone = #{phone}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
dose_number = #{doseNumber}, next_dose_date = #{nextDoseDate}, is_completed = #{isCompleted},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from vaccine_appointment where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vaccine_appointment WHERE vaccine_id = #{vaccineId} AND DATE(appointment_date) = DATE(#{appointmentDate}) AND status != '3'

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.vaccine_id, a.appointment_date, a.time_slot, a.status, a.phone, a.remark, a.dose_number, a.next_dose_date, a.is_completed, a.create_time FROM vaccine_appointment a WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.vaccine_id = #{vaccineId} AND a.status != '3' ORDER BY a.dose_number ASC

-- 1. 查询已存在但未完成的预约（已预约但还没接种） SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.vaccine_id, v.name as vaccineName, a.appointment_date, a.time_slot, a.status, a.dose_number, a.next_dose_date, a.is_completed, a.create_time, v.total_doses as totalDoses, v.is_multi_dose as isMultiDose FROM vaccine_appointment a LEFT JOIN vaccine_information v ON a.vaccine_id = v.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_completed = 0 AND a.status IN ('0', '1')
UNION ALL
-- 2. 查询需要接种但还没预约的下一剂（已完成上一剂，但还没预约下一剂） SELECT NULL as id, #{userId} as user_id, v.id as vaccine_id, v.name as vaccineName, NULL as appointment_date, NULL as time_slot, 'pending' as status, (COALESCE(MAX(a.dose_number), 0) + 1) as dose_number, -- 🔥 下一针日期 = 最后一剂完成日期 + 间隔天数 CASE WHEN MAX(a.appointment_date) IS NOT NULL THEN DATE_ADD(MAX(a.appointment_date), INTERVAL v.interval_days DAY) ELSE NULL END as next_dose_date, 0 as is_completed, NOW() as create_time, v.total_doses as totalDoses, v.is_multi_dose as isMultiDose FROM vaccine_information v INNER JOIN vaccine_appointment a ON v.id = a.vaccine_id AND a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_completed = 1 AND a.status IN ('1', '2') WHERE v.is_multi_dose = 1 AND v.status = '0' GROUP BY v.id, v.name, v.interval_days, v.total_doses, v.is_multi_dose HAVING COALESCE(MAX(a.dose_number), 0) < v.total_doses

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, u.user_name as userName, u.phonenumber as userPhone, a.vaccine_id, v.name as vaccineName, a.dose_number, a.appointment_date, a.time_slot, a.status FROM vaccine_appointment a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN vaccine_information v ON a.vaccine_id = v.id WHERE a.status = '1' AND a.appointment_date = CURDATE() AND (a.is_completed = 0 OR a.is_completed IS NULL) ORDER BY a.time_slot ASC

SELECT v.id as vaccineId, v.name as vaccineName, v.stock as totalStock, v.is_multi_dose as isMultiDose, v.total_doses as totalDoses, -- 总预约数 COUNT(a.id) as totalAppointments, -- 已完成首剂的人数（dose_number = 1 且 is_completed = 1） SUM(CASE WHEN a.dose_number = 1 AND a.is_completed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as firstDoseCompleted, -- 已完成全部剂次的人数（dose_number = total_doses AND is_completed = 1） SUM(CASE WHEN a.dose_number = v.total_doses AND a.is_completed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as allDosesCompleted, -- 使用率 ROUND(COUNT(a.id) * 100.0 / v.stock, 1) as usageRate FROM vaccine_information v LEFT JOIN vaccine_appointment a ON v.id = a.vaccine_id AND a.status IN ('1', '2') WHERE v.status = '0' GROUP BY v.id, v.name, v.stock, v.is_multi_dose, v.total_doses ORDER BY usageRate DESC

SELECT v.id as vaccineId, v.name as vaccineName, COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) as vaccinatedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = '0') as totalUsers, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = '0'), 1) as coverageRate FROM vaccine_information v LEFT JOIN vaccine_appointment a ON v.id = a.vaccine_id AND a.status IN ('2') GROUP BY v.id, v.name ORDER BY coverageRate DESC

SELECT dose_number, COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_completed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_completed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) as completionRate FROM vaccine_appointment WHERE vaccine_id = #{vaccineId} AND status != '3' GROUP BY dose_number ORDER BY dose_number ASC

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.vaccine_id, a.appointment_date, a.time_slot, a.status, a.dose_number, a.next_dose_date, a.is_completed, a.create_time FROM vaccine_appointment a WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.vaccine_id = #{vaccineId} AND a.status != '3' ORDER BY a.dose_number DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(appointment_date, '%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dose_number = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as firstDoseCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dose_number > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as boosterDoseCount FROM vaccine_appointment WHERE appointment_date BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND status IN ('1', '2') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(appointment_date, '%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vaccine_appointment WHERE vaccine_id = #{vaccineId} AND status IN ('0', '1', '2')
